info.description: API for managing your D&D campaign characters, inventory, spells and combat.
info.title: Behold D&D API

put.summary: Update active conditions on a character

get.summary: List inventory items for a character

post.summary: Add an item to a character's inventory
Remove attunement from a magic item
Long rest — restores HP, hit dice, resets death saves, conditions and spell slots
Short rest — spend hit dice to regain HP

get.summary: List spell slots for a character

put.summary: Create or update a spell slot level

post.summary: Add a spell to a character
Add temporary HP to a character
Add a participant to an encounter

parameters.description: Participant data. Provide character_id to copy stats from a character sheet, or fill in fields manually.
parameters.name: body

delete.summary: Remove a participant from an encounter

post.summary: Deactivate a participant (knocked out or fled)
Give Temp HP to a participant

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by your JWT token
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
